review_reason: Direct case-based proof generates unbounded iteration. The 'at most 2 density applications' claim from plan v002 is incorrect - counterexample: c~p and d~q gives [p]=[c]<[d]=[q], requiring 3+ iterations. Need mathematical review to find correct termination measure.

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 blocked. strict_intermediate_exists has 6 sorries due to unbounded case tree. NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder have 2 sorries depending on strict_intermediate_exists.

errors.message: Direct case-based proof with 2 density applications does not cover all cases. Branches c~p with d~q require additional iteration.
errors.recommendation: Find a correct termination measure or prove equivalence classes are finite

completion_data.completion_summary: Attempted direct case-based proof for strict_intermediate_exists. Added mutual_canonicalR_implies_reflexive theorem. Discovered that plan v002's 'at most 2 iterations' claim is incorrect. 6 sorries remain in strict_intermediate_exists, 2 in NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder.
